mapper.sql: trade_id, option_type, option_style, strike_price, premium_amount, premium_currency, premium_value_date, premium_paid_flag, premium_account_id, maturity_date, exercise_date, exercise_flag, abandon_flag, settlement_method, buyer_seller, currency1_account, currency2_account, notional_amount, currency1_amount, currency2_amount, observation_start_date, observation_end_date, exercise_time_point, days, auto_exercise_flag, close_date, close_premium, close_pnl, closed_amount, remaining_amount, reference_rate
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_option_trade (trade_id, option_type, option_style, strike_price, premium_amount, premium_currency, premium_value_date, premium_paid_flag, premium_account_id, maturity_date, exercise_date, exercise_flag, abandon_flag, settlement_method, buyer_seller, currency1_account, currency2_account, notional_amount, currency1_amount, currency2_amount, observation_start_date, observation_end_date, exercise_time_point, days, auto_exercise_flag, close_date, close_premium, close_pnl, closed_amount, remaining_amount, reference_rate) VALUES (#{tradeId}, #{optionType}, #{optionStyle}, #{strikePrice}, #{premiumAmount}, #{premiumCurrency}, #{premiumValueDate}, #{premiumPaidFlag}, #{premiumAccountId}, #{maturityDate}, #{exerciseDate}, #{exerciseFlag}, #{abandonFlag}, #{settlementMethod}, #{buyerSeller}, #{currency1Account}, #{currency2Account}, #{notionalAmount}, #{currency1Amount}, #{currency2Amount}, #{observationStartDate}, #{observationEndDate}, #{exerciseTimePoint}, #{days}, #{autoExerciseFlag}, #{closeDate}, #{closePremium}, #{closePnl}, #{closedAmount}, #{remainingAmount}, #{referenceRate})
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM fx_option_trade
ORDER BY trade_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT FROM fx_option_trade WHERE option_style = 'AMERICAN' AND exercise_flag = '0' AND abandon_flag = '0' AND ( (option_type = 'CALL' AND reference_rate IS NOT NULL AND strike_price IS NOT NULL AND reference_rate > strike_price) OR (option_type = 'PUT' AND reference_rate IS NOT NULL AND strike_price IS NOT NULL AND reference_rate < strike_price) )
